title: Silicone Spatula - Heat Resistant Seamless Scraper, Non-Stick Baking Tool for Cake, Cream, Butter - Kitchen Utensil for Cooking, Baking and Mixing

🥄 Size: The size of the non-stick baking spatula is about 23.8*2.1*0.7 cm, the right size, light weight and can be hung up when not in use that it does not take up much space.
